name: brand_processing_workflow
description: Workflow applying processing steps on a brand entity using an FSM model.

transitions.name: add_timestamp_transition
transitions.description: Add processed timestamp to the brand entity.
transitions.end_state_description: The timestamp has been added to the entity

externalized_processors.name: process_add_timestamp
externalized_processors.description: Adds the current UTC timestamp to the entity.

transitions.name: add_supplementary_info_transition
transitions.description: Add supplementary information to the brand entity.
transitions.start_state_description: Timestamp has been added to the entity
transitions.end_state_description: Supplementary information has been fetched and added to the entity

externalized_processors.name: process_add_supplementary_info
externalized_processors.description: Fetches additional information asynchronously and updates the entity.
